title: Okta user lifecycle state
description: Per-user lifecycle + MFA-enrolment state from /api/v1/users. Reconciled on a schedule; one record per user per run. Feeds SCIM-compliance evidence for account provisioning + deprovisioning controls (joiner/mover/leaver) plus MFA-enrolment coverage.

login.description: Okta `profile.login` value — typically the IdP-canonical username/email.

status.description: Okta user status. The evaluator distinguishes ACTIVE (good) from DEPROVISIONED/SUSPENDED (must be off entitlements).

mfa_enrolled.description: True if the user has at least one active non-recovery MFA factor enrolled.
